message:
fix(runtime): make AOF replay fail-closed and abort MULTI on unknown commands

Rewrite load_aof to replay into a fresh replayed_store instead of
mutating self.store in-place. Only swap store and aof_records on full
replay success — invalid commands during replay now return
PersistError::InvalidFrame without corrupting existing state.

Add exec_abort flag to TransactionState: if an unknown command is
queued inside a MULTI block, exec_abort is set and the error is
returned immediately, preventing partial transaction execution.

Two new tests: load_aof_replaces_existing_store_and_tracks_loaded_records
and load_aof_rejects_invalid_replay_without_mutating_existing_state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
